title: PipeSync header menu + PDF Viewer workspace menu fix (dbg110)
description:
PipeSync desktop header now uses the same hamburger Menu pattern as PipeShare. Horizon Site, Refresh, Tour, Manage account settings, and Sign out are consolidated into one top-right dropdown so the header is less cluttered. Sync status and user badge stay visible.

PDF Viewer workspace: fixes the missing ☰ menu. The viewer chrome was not rendering because the workspace passed the wrong state key into the chrome builder. The floating menu is pinned top-right in fullscreen and Close workspace works again.

Who is affected: OVH private server PipeSync (desktop header and Plan View PDF Viewer). SaaS only when you apply the new version in releases.html.
changeLog: PipeShare-style Menu dropdown in PipeSync header (Horizon Site, Refresh, Tour, Account, Sign out).
Fix PDF Viewer ☰ workspace menu not appearing (chrome render state key).
PDF Viewer menu fixed top-right in fullscreen; line/opacity floats unchanged.
